accurate.why: Faithfully describes GAO study and report mandate; matches bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; GAO=Comptroller General is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Identifies purpose: GAO study on illicit financing of synthetic drug trafficking.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill creates a study mandate; amends no existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this study mandate.

effective_dates.why: CRS reference omits the report deadline; high-level summary, not material.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures study scope and reporting requirement.

correct_entities.why: Comptroller General/GAO and named apps correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
